textByHashes.e5a01cf4c02c3d830832c48f27dc55c5c3230c3d: Bah! A great artist such as myself should not have to suffer the HUMILIATION of spending time where the likes of you wander everywhere!
textByHashes.742d7779be7e40b7ec1d42e78f992f8f91eb7c99: Well that's my job yes. But I don't necessarily define my identity in such black and white terms.
textByHashes.c18b9d1b69facaba75378656f006c903bfeaa528: Okay, I'll meet you at the Dancing Donkey in Varrock.
textByHashes.86f5c5297047860f011ef43f471d0a5b68c820e6: Oh, it's you again. Please don't distract me now, I'm contemplating the sublime.
textByHashes.229e43aaae2588032d6610f5358cd6d8c8b98096: Hello again. I hope your journey was as pleasant as mine.
textByHashes.daa665323b70e670cee20cfe367530d7a3314cd2: Package? That's a funny way to describe a liquid of such exquisite beauty!
textByHashes.8baa641a81276c815acf612cbb98d8f6ae109641: Absolutely. It's just not stored in a vial anymore.
textByHashes.c44e929b9c679a439b91c7a96f51a52a64d55afc: Instead it has been liberated. It now gleams from the canvas of my latest epic: The Majesty of Varrock!
textByHashes.aeabf6f3741f412dd609a939305fed6fd5e19f36: Well you can't put a price on art.
